inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar mehsoos kar raha hoon, sir dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although fever is a symptom, it's not specific enough to suspect typhoid at this stage

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai aur kabz ki samasya hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation are common in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever can still be due to a viral cause

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain could suggest typhoid, but other symptoms are needed for confirmation

inputs.text: Ab mere bukhar tez ho gaya hai, kabz ke baad dast ho rahi hai aur mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although gastroenteritis can cause abdominal symptoms, the severe weakness and step-wise fever pattern is more indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclic fever patterns, which is not seen here

inputs.text: Main bahut thak gaya hoon, mujhe lagta hai ki main uth nahi paunga, bukhar abhi tak hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The patient's condition has worsened with persistent high fever, severe weakness, and risk of intestinal perforation, confirming typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the prolonged and severe nature of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of cyclic fever and other malaria-specific symptoms
